title: Nursery Rhyme. CCCCLVIII. Love And Matrimony.
content:
Did you see my wife, did you see, did you see,
            Did you see my wife looking for me?
        She wears a straw bonnet, with white ribbands on it,
            And dimity petticoats over her knee.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Unknown delivers a powerful performance in "Nursery Rhyme. CCCCLVIII. Love And Matrimony."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
